title: CreateLongTermPricingRequest
description: CreateLongTermPricingRequest schema from Amazon Snow Family API

allOf.description: The type of long-term pricing option you want for the device, either 1-year or 3-year long-term pricing.
Specifies whether the current long-term pricing type for the device should be renewed.
The type of Snow Family devices to use for the long-term pricing job.
